pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh, task.json, and export_result.sh
export_result.sh writes results to this path and verifier.py reads from it
setup_task.sh generates the brief file at this location
setup_task.sh requires setting FS_THR_ENABLE and FS_GCS_ENABLE to 2, and verifier.py checks for 2
Target latitude provided in setup_task.sh generated brief and verified in verifier.py
Target longitude provided in setup_task.sh generated brief and verified in verifier.py
Target altitude provided in setup_task.sh generated brief and verified in verifier.py
Target heading provided in setup_task.sh generated brief and verified in verifier.py
Target loiter time provided in setup_task.sh generated brief and verified in verifier.py

privileged_info_summary: The task involves synthetically generated instructions for a QGroundControl drone comm relay deployment mission. The target plan path is '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/comm_relay.plan' and the result file is exported to '/tmp/task_result.json'. The brief, generated at '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/relay_deployment_brief.txt', explicitly requires changing failsafe values (FS_THR_ENABLE and FS_GCS_ENABLE) to 2. The mission plan must include a waypoint at latitude -35.358, longitude 149.166, and altitude 110 meters, a heading change to 245 degrees, and a loiter time of 3600 seconds. All these parameters are successfully cross-verified against the setup script instructions and verifier logic.
